title: HSSIB annual report and accounts: 2024 to 2025
body: "The Health Services Safety Investigations Body (HSSIB) conducts investigations into patient safety incidents in the NHS and independent sector.  The report:   sets out the future aims and vision of the organisation includes a comprehensive accountability report covering HSSIB governance, leadership, staff arrangements and remuneration reflects on progress, highlights and achievements to date. analyses HSSIB’s performance and sets out its commitments to equality, diversity and inclusion includes accounts and financial statements   "
